style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from bulbasaur's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its metallic sheen. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along the seams of its steel shell, casting cold cyan light that illuminates metallic dust particles swirling in slow motion. The aura is a sharp, crystalline blue-white halo with geometric precision, casting a sterile yet dynamic glow over the scene. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
